intentSynonyms: look up category products in dominos
fetch a single category products in dominos
view one specific category products in dominos
list products in a menu category in dominos
description: List all products (menu items) within a menu category. Use the category_id from get_menu_categories. Common categories: BuildYourOwn, Specialty, Bread, Tots, Wings, Dessert, Pasta, Sandwich, GSalad, Drinks, Sides.

store_id.description: Store ID for store-specific pricing and availability
